task_completion.description: Verify that the CT Cranium dataset is loaded into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice views (Axial, Sagittal, Coronal) should display radiological images of a human head/skull.

task_completion.description: Verify that the interface is configured to a 4-panel view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main workspace should be divided into four distinct panels showing the Axial, Sagittal, Coronal, and 3D views simultaneously.

task_completion.description: Verify that the anatomical structures are centered in the slice views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The skull/brain structures should be clearly visible and centered within the Axial, Sagittal, and Coronal panels, not cut off or pushed to the edges.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 3D surface of the skull is generated using the Bone threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D visualization panel should display a 3D reconstruction of a skull (typically appearing as a solid bone-like structure).

task_completion.description: Verify that the background color of the 3D visualization panel is white.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The background of the panel containing the 3D skull reconstruction must be white (or very light grey), not black, blue, or a gradient.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the full interface is exported to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or screenshot tool should be visible saving an image to '/home/ga/Documents/radiology_summary.png'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the InVesalius GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking menus, adjusting thresholds, and changing layout settings within the InVesalius application interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the 3D surface is genuinely generated from the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D skull should match the loaded CT Cranium dataset and appear within the application's native 3D viewer, not as an imported or pasted image.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshot was actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should complete the save process (e.g., clicking 'Save' in a dialog or executing a screenshot command) rather than just typing the path without executing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the CT Cranium dataset (case 0051). The output screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/radiology_summary.png and be at least 50KB. The 3D visualization panel background must be white (not black, blue, or a gradient). The layout must be a 4-panel view (Axial, Sagittal, Coronal, and 3D reconstruction).
